capabilities.authority_statement: can_X does not imply may_X. Capabilities listed do not authorize action.

risk_profile.risk_reason: No write, shell, browser, MCP, credential, or external API capability.
mitigations: All actions are read-only by design.
risk_profile.boundary_enforcement: Capability fields frozen at adapter init.

non_execution_statement: This manifest describes capability only. It does not execute.
authority_statement: Capability declaration is not authorization. This manifest does not authorize any action.
